# Word frequency tiers for difficulty classification
# easy:   zipf >= 5.8  (~basic everyday vocabulary)
# medium: zipf >= 5.0  (~common but not basic)
# hard:   everything else (not listed — default in generate_words.py)
# Generated by tools/fetch_fry.py — re-run to refresh.
